name: remembrance-seams
description: The wiring contract. Each declared seam is a capability that should be CONTRIBUTING to the Remembrance field (a source in the field's per-source histogram). `npm run check:seams` diffs this against the live field: a declared seam with no recent contribution is silent drift — built but not flowing. This turns the ecosystem's #1 risk into a self-checking property.

seams.describe: Admitted leads contribute to the field through the covenant gate (lead-ledger recordBenefit). Inert = leads stopped flowing or the gate broke silently.
Rejected leads register an entropy cost (lead-ledger recordCost).
The local recall->librarian->verify->remember loop (the `remembrance` CLI / remembranced).
Resolved lead outcomes (won/lost) close the loop into the field — the external truth that validates the coherency grade (lead-outcomes recordBenefit/recordCost).
The meta seam: `check:seams --contribute` feeds the field its own wiring-coherence. If this goes stale, the watcher itself stopped running — the field stays aware of whether it is being watched.

The self-healing proposer: `propose:wire --contribute` finds each gap's nearest wired sibling by resonance and feeds the field a proposal-confidence. Run it (locally / on a schedule) so the field is aware it can propose its own fixes, not just notice gaps.
The covenant gate admits/rejects patterns by coherency. Declared from the field's own histogram — it was flowing untracked.
The external reality-check — phase-randomized null / coherency / entropy falsification. The one seam whose silence means the system stopped testing itself against the world.
The witness ledger — pattern lifecycle events (REGISTER/PROMOTE/HEAL/PUBLISH/ANCHOR/…). The non-local durability spine recording into the field.
Multi-provider swarm consensus contributing to the field.
The compressor's coherency measurement (void:coherency_v3) feeding the field.

Complexity/simplicity scoring flows to the field (scoring-analysis-complexity + analytics:complexity). Inert = the ecosystem stopped measuring its own complexity — the weakest coherence axis going blind.
Library-wide aggregate simplicity ratio (atomic/composite/architectural mix) contributed by generateAnalytics. Inert = the analytics complexity readout stopped reaching the field.
